response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer (~15 years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js, AWS CDK, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role demands 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the candidate's GenAI work is recent and brief (under a year). Core requirements like Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent frameworks are absent or unproven, and customer-facing technical leadership is not clearly evidenced. The depth of general engineering and the MCP/agentic signal warrant a closer look, but the AI-specific gap against a Staff GenAI bar is significant.
strengths: ~15 years of broad full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS CDK
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure
Demonstrated engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) and teaching/mentoring track record
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is recent and brief, far short of the 8+ years of production AI required
No evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited demonstration of customer-facing technical-leadership/discovery responsibilities
